name: alchemical_synthesis_enhancer_ob3ect
description: Self-verifying ob3ect that maps the 7 stages of the Great Work to retrosynthetic analysis operations. Each alchemical stage corresponds to a structural primitive transformation that, when applied in sequence, achieves Frobenius closure.

calcination.description: Purification by thermal decomposition or distillation

conjunction.description: Union of opposites — bioconjugation or cross-coupling

distillation.description: Purification by winding — each plate = one winding

closure_condition: μ∘δ=id verified when all 7 stages complete
